title: malus toringo var. typica
intro: Malus toringo var. typica, also known as the Chinese crabapple, is a plant species within the Malus genus that belongs to the family Rosaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough, and aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal disorders. Malus toringo var. typica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to create medicinal pills and ointments.
